meta.name: PokéStock Canada curated POC catalog
meta.disclaimer: Release details are sourced from official Pokémon pages. Canadian price and availability remain unknown until supported by a Canada-specific public source.

products.name: 30th Celebration Tech Sticker Collection
products.summary: A foil Alolan Exeggutor or Lucario promo, matching sticker sheet, and three 30th Celebration booster packs.
products.canadaNote: The global product release is official; a Canada-specific listing or CAD reference price has not been recorded in this POC.

source.title: Pokémon TCG: 30th Celebration Tech Sticker Collection

products.name: Mega Evolution—Chaos Rising Elite Trainer Box
products.summary: Nine Chaos Rising booster packs, a Fennekin promo, sleeves, Energy cards, dice, accessories, and a storage box.
products.canadaNote: The official showcase says products are available at Pokémon Center and other TCG retailers; verify the regional storefront before purchasing.

products.name: Mega Moonlit Tin
products.summary: Choose a Mega Gengar ex or Mega Clefable ex foil promo and open four booster packs.
products.canadaNote: The product is officially released; this POC does not claim current Canadian stock.

products.name: Mega Evolution—Ascended Heroes Booster Bundle
products.summary: A compact bundle containing six booster packs from the Ascended Heroes expansion.
products.canadaNote: The official product page confirms broad release, but no live Canadian availability is asserted here.
